nasb.text: You shall say to the rebellious ones, to the house of Israel, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Enough of all your abominations, O house of Israel,

esv.text: And say to the rebellious house, to the house of Israel, Thus says the Lord God: O house of Israel, enough of all your abominations,

cnv.text: 你要對悖逆的以色列家說：‘主耶和華這樣說：以色列家啊！你們所行一切可憎的事，該夠了吧！

ccb.text: 然后告诉那些叛逆的以色列人，‘主耶和华这样说，以色列人啊，你们行可憎的事，该够了吧！
